title: Celtic Lakes overhead line screening opinion, Electricity Works (EIA) Regulations 2017
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  30 January 2025  Location   Gwent LevelsSt Brides Site of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI)Wales   Type of project / consent requested  Not applicable: S37 application will be made in the future. "
